sentences.arabic: بِرُّ الْوَالِدَيْنِ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ الْأَعْمَالِ الصَّالِحَةِ بَعْدَ التَّوْحِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Dobročinstvo prema roditeljima je jedno od najvećih dobrih djela nakon tewhida.
sentences.translationEn: Being dutiful to parents is one of the greatest righteous deeds after Tawhid.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ إِنَّ طَاعَةَ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَاجِبَةٌ فِي غَيْرِ مَعْصِيَةِ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Usejmin kaže da je pokornost roditeljima obavezna, osim u onome što je grijeh prema Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen says that obedience to parents is obligatory as long as it does not involve disobedience to Allah.

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ يُعَامِلُ أَبَاهُ وَأُمَّهُ بِالرِّفْقِ وَاللِّينِ وَالْإِحْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman se prema ocu i majci ophodi s blagošću, nježnošću i dobročinstvom.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim treats his father and mother with kindness, gentleness, and excellence.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَدْعُوَ لَهُمَا بِالرَّحْمَةِ فِي حَيَاتِهِمَا وَبَعْدَ مَوْتِهِمَا.
sentences.translation: Moramo moliti za milost njima tokom njihovog života i nakon njihove smrti.
sentences.translationEn: We must pray for mercy for them during their lives and after their deaths.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْخُلُقُ الْكَرِيمُ يَنْشُرُ الْمَحَبَّةَ وَالسَّعَادَةَ دَاخِلَ الْأُسْرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj plemeniti ahlak širi ljubav i sreću unutar porodice.
sentences.translationEn: This noble character spreads love and happiness within the family.
